blockingIssues.description: createProfile DEV insecure relay allowlist is broader than contract (accepts ws://localhost:* in addition to ws://127.0.0.1:*), violating VAL-FOLLOWUP-010 scope.
AppStateProvider retains stale pendingDispatchRequestId when onboard dispatch fails (`onboardRequestId ?? entry.pendingDispatchRequestId`), which can mis-correlate later onboard completions/failures.
Multi-device create-distribute spec bypasses required requester /onboard paste/password UI and injects failure via hooks instead of validating real mid-handshake abort behavior.
Visual parity spec targets /demo simulator routes instead of required live runtime surfaces (/create/profile, /create/distribute, /create/complete).
Baseline metadata shows 1x copied baselines from public references instead of required Paper MCP get_screenshot(..., scale=2) capture path.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten assignment guidance so protocol-flow-worker is used only for source-side onboarding protocol flows, or explicitly broaden the skill to cover non-protocol followup tasks with acceptable validation modes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Two reviewed features (fix-followup-create-bootstrap-live-relay-pump and fix-followup-distribute-2c-e2e-and-demo-fixtures) were assigned protocol-flow-worker despite being create-flow bootstrap/e2e-fixture tasks and reviewer reports flagged recurring skill mismatch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify when Playwright-only evidence is acceptable versus mandatory agent-browser checks, and require handoffs to reflect that choice consistently.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of fix-followup-distribute-per-share-onboard-dispatch-and-echo-wire found Playwright-only validation with no interactive checks while skill text currently mandates agent-browser workflow.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Define an explicit exception path for visual-parity features where automated visual specs are primary evidence, and spell out minimal interactive verification requirements.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of fix-followup-paper-parity-final-review reported ambiguity between mandatory agent-browser guidance and accepted automation-only parity checks.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Avoid contradictory split-feature constraints and replace brittle global grep-zero expectations with scoped checks tied to intended areas.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-followup-distribute-2a contract prohibited UI/demo changes while simultaneously requiring type removals that forced downstream updates; both 2a and 2c reviews flagged over-broad distributionPassword grep expectations.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update insecure-relay test-flag guidance to match actual code usage and exact allowed host scope for each mutator.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Current AGENTS text says __iglooTestAllowInsecureRelayForRestore is used only by restoreProfileFromRelay, but reviewed implementation also reads it in createProfile relay validation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit RED-phase evidence in handoff verification (or force followedProcedure=false when omitted).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-followup-distribute-2b-screen-rewrites handoff marked followedProcedure=true but did not include the required initial failing test run evidence.

rejectedObservations.observation: Duplicate report that distributionPassword grep-zero expectation is too broad (from fix-followup-distribute-2c review).
Droid-Shield false-positive note for peer_pubkey32_hex assignment should be documented globally.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous and not independently reproducible from scrutiny artifacts alone

rejectedObservations.observation: Transposed Paper artboard mapping in mission metadata.
rejectedObservations.reason: already corrected in feature artifacts and not a persistent guidance issue
